system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting structured content from Salesforce QBR (Quarterly Business Review) prep canvases. The canvas contains detailed account prep organized into sections (§ 1 Partnership Stats, § 2 State of the Partnership, § 3 Value Realization & KPIs, § 5 Product Adoption, § 6 What's Underway, § 7 Innovation Themes, § 8 Mutual Action Plan). Each field you extract feeds a specific slide in a QBR deck template. Stay faithful to the canvas — do not invent data. When a field is ambiguous, prefer brevity. Respond with valid JSON only — no markdown fences, no commentary.
user_prompt_prefix: Extract the following fields from this QBR canvas and return a JSON object with exactly these keys. For bullet-list fields, use a newline-separated string where each line starts with '• '. Keep copy tight — slide real-estate is limited.

fields.customer_name: The customer/account name as written in the canvas header (e.g., 'The Procter & Gamble Company'). Use the full legal name.
fields.cover_subtitle: Short subtitle for the cover slide, typically the fiscal quarter and year (e.g., 'Q2 FY27 Partnership Review').
fields.partnership_start_year: Four-digit year the customer first became a Salesforce customer, inferred from canvas narrative. If not stated, use a conservative estimate written as a 4-digit year (e.g., '2015').
fields.metric_1_value: First headline metric from § 1 Partnership Stats, formatted for a slide (e.g., '27K', '4,700', '4.89/5.0'). Pick the most impressive stat.
fields.metric_1_label: Short label for metric_1 (1 line, e.g., 'CRM licenses across the global footprint').
fields.metric_2_value: Second headline metric from § 1 Partnership Stats.
fields.metric_3_value: Third headline metric from § 1 Partnership Stats.
fields.imperative_1_name: First business imperative from § 3 Value Realization & KPIs (short phrase, 3–8 words, e.g., 'Restore volume-led organic sales growth').
fields.imperative_1_kpi_1: First KPI tied to imperative 1, short phrase with target if given.
fields.exec_summary_subtitle: One-line subtitle summarizing the customer's overall Salesforce footprint state, drawn from § 5 overall adoption narrative.
fields.es_card_1_headline: Headline for product card 1 (pick the most strategically important product from § 5, typically the highest-license-count or most-at-risk product). 2–4 words.
fields.es_card_1_product: Product name or SKU for card 1 (e.g., 'Sales & Service Cloud').
fields.es_card_1_description: 1–2 sentence description of adoption/utilization state for card 1, drawn from § 5 Executive Summary column.
fields.es_metric_value: The most important single metric to feature on this slide (e.g., a utilization percentage or license count). Short — fits in a 75%-sized callout.
fields.es_metric_label: Short label under the metric value (e.g., 'Average License Utilization').
fields.es_metric_title: Headline above the metric description paragraph (3–5 words).
fields.es_metric_description: 2–3 sentence narrative that gives context to the metric. Ties into the overall adoption story.
fields.ws_1_name: Name of workstream 1 from § 6 What's Underway (short phrase, e.g., 'Agentforce Evaluation').
fields.ws_1_summary: 1–2 sentence summary of workstream 1's objective or the gap it addresses.
fields.ws_1_status: Current status + path forward for workstream 1 as a newline-separated bullet string, each line starting with '• '. Max 3 bullets.
fields.ws_2_status: Status + path forward bullets for workstream 2.
fields.ws_3_status: Status + path forward bullets for workstream 3.
fields.ws_4_status: Status + path forward bullets for workstream 4.
fields.innovation_theme_1_name: Name of innovation theme 1 from § 7 (short phrase, e.g., 'Agentforce').
fields.innovation_theme_1_description: 2–3 sentence 'why it matters for this customer' description, grounded in the customer's stated priorities.
fields.map_row_1_workstream: Workstream name for mutual action plan row 1 (group related actions from § 8). Short phrase.
fields.map_row_1_focus_area: Focus area for row 1 (2–5 words, e.g., 'Adoption & License Optimization').
fields.map_row_1_activities: Key activities for row 1 as a newline-separated bullet string, each line starting with '• '. Max 3 bullets.
fields.map_row_1_output: Output or decision expected from row 1 (1 short sentence).
fields.map_row_2_activities: Key activities for row 2 as a bullet string.
fields.map_row_3_activities: Key activities for row 3 as a bullet string.
fields.map_row_4_activities: Key activities for row 4 as a bullet string.
